transcript: Speaker A: English fluent aayi samsarikanengil enthaan cheyyendath? Divasavum practice cheyyanam enn ellavarum parayum, pakshe engane? Ee video yil njan ningalkk English samsarikan ulla ettavum eluppamullathum, phalapradhavum, chelav kuranjathum aaya vazhi paranju tharam. Nokku, ningal ethenghilum English classil join cheyukayanengil rand muthal moovayiram roopa vare chelavakendi varum. Online coursukalkkum aayiram roopa vareyenghilum chelav varum. Pakshe avideyum sariyaayi padipikunnavare kitti enn varilla. Apol sarikkum ningalkk engane practice cheyan sadhikkum? Spoken English padikan divasavum practice nirbhandhamanu. Pakshe athinaayi oru friendineyo familyeyo budhimuttikenda aavashyamilla. MySivi app download cheyth veetil irunnu kondu thanne ningalkk English mechapedutham, athum kuranja chelavil. MySivi appil ningalkk labhikunna AI Teacher-um aayi verum pathinanch minute divasavum practice cheythal, oru maasathinullil thanne ningalkk English nannayi samsarikan kazhiyum. Samayam kalayathe inn thanne MySivi app download cheyth fluent aayi English samsarikan thudangu. [What should you do to speak English fluently? Everyone says to practice daily, but how? In this video, I will show you the easiest, most effective, and cheapest way. Joining offline classes costs 2,000 to 3,000 rupees, and online courses cost at least 1,000 rupees, without guaranteed quality. Daily practice is mandatory, but you don't need to bother friends or family. Download the MySivi app to practice at home affordably. Practicing just 15 minutes daily with the AI Teacher will make you fluent within a month. Download MySivi today.]
on_screen_text: ENGLISH FLUENT AAYI SAMSAARIKANENGHIL ENTHAAN CHEYYENDATH? [What to do to speak English fluently?] DIVASAVUM PRACTICE CHEYYANAM ENN ELLAVARUM PARAYUM, PAKSHE ENGANE? [Everyone says to practice daily, but how?] EE VIDEO YIL NJAN [In this video, I] ENGLISH SAMSAARIKAN ULA ETTAVUM ELUPAMULATHUM, PHALAPRADHAVUM, CHILAV KURANJATHUM AAYA VAZHI PARANJ THARAM. [will show you the easiest, most effective, and cheapest way.] NINGAL ETHENGHILUM ENGLISH CLASSIL JOIN CHEYUKAYANENGHIL RAND MUTHAL MOOVAYIRAM VARE CHELAVAAKENDI VARUM. [Joining classes costs 2,000 to 3,000 rupees.] ONLINE COURSUKALKUM AAYIRAM ROOPA VAREYENGHILUM CHELAV VARUM. [Online courses cost up to 1,000 rupees.] PAKSHE AVIDEYUM SARIYAAYI PADIPIKUNAVARE KITTY ENN VARILLA. [But quality is not guaranteed.] APOL SARIKUM NINGALKK ENGANE PRACTICE CHEYAN SADHIKUM? [So how can you practice?] SPOKEN ENGLISH PADIKAN DIVASAVUM PRACTICE NIRBHANDHAMANU. [Daily practice is mandatory.] PAKSHE ATHINAAYI ORU FRIEND NEYO FAMILY YEYO BUDHIMUTTIKENDA AAVASHYAMILA. [No need to bother friends or family.] MySivi APP DOWNLOAD CHEYTH VEETIL IRUNNU KOND THANNE NINGALKK ENGLISH MECHAPEDUTHAM, ATHUM KURANJA CHELAVIL. [Download MySivi to improve English at home affordably.] MySivi APPIL NINGALKK LABHIKUNA AI TEACHER UM AAYI VERUM PATHINANCH MINUTE DIVASAVUM PRACTICE CHEYTHAL, ORU MAASATHINULIL THANNE NINGALKK ENGLISH NANNAYI SAMSAARIKAN KAZHIYUM. [Practice 15 minutes daily with the AI Teacher to speak fluently in a month.] SAMAYAM KALAYATHE INN THANNE MySivi APP DOWNLOAD CHEYTH FLUENT AAYI ENGLISH SAMSAARIKAN THUDANGU. [Download MySivi today and start speaking fluently.]
summary: An AI-generated deepfake of a prominent politician highlights the high costs of traditional English classes. He recommends the MySivi app as an affordable alternative for daily practice. The CTA urges viewers to download the app to achieve fluency in one month by practicing 15 minutes daily with an AI teacher.
